item.title: Contact
item.description:
Tomasz Muchowski Advisory al. Solidarności 68/121 00-240 Warsaw, Poland

Tax ID (NIP): 6661814145

Correspondence and Business Inquiries

To maintain the highest standards of confidentiality and information security, please direct all business inquiries directly to the following e-mail address:

E-mail: kontakt [at] muchowskiadvisory.pl (Replace [at] with the @ symbol)


*Note: Out of respect for our visitors' privacy, this website does not use contact forms or external scripts that process personal data for marketing purposes.*

item.title: Is Chinese AI about to burst the American tech bubble? 🇨🇳🇺🇸
item.description:
While Silicon Valley spends billions developing increasingly powerful models, China has found a way to offer 90% of the same quality at a fraction of the cost. How is this possible? Here are the key takeaways from the analysis of the current AI market situation published at https://lnkd.in/dEc2j9wG :

🚀 Extreme cost disparity The US spends around $1 trillion annually on building AI (3% of its GDP), while China’s spending is just a fraction of that – approx. $102-123 billion (0.6% of GDP). The result? The exact same coding task that costs $2.33 in America’s Claude Opus costs just $0.31 in China’s GLM model – that’s 7.5 times cheaper!

item.title: About Me
item.description:
My name is Tomasz Muchowski. I am a licensed securities broker registered with the Polish Financial Supervision Authority, KNF, under license number 3705 and a holder of the international CIIA (Certified International Investment Analyst) designation (CIIA Holders List).

My professional background includes also managing organizational structures in General Manager roles. I am a minimalist and an essentialist, and I treat confidentiality and information security as an absolute priority. That is why this website is kept simple, ensuring full respect for the privacy of its visitors:
